languageTexts.text: Multiple parties may nominate the same candidate, allowing voters to choose the party that best matches their value. The candidate's vote total is the sum of the votes received for each party.
Click on a result to see the ballot status.
Click here to view all codes.
Could not find a confirmation code beginning with
Ballot has been accepted and will be included in the count.
This ballot was challenged and was not included in the final count.
Ballot was included in the count.
Ballot had a problem and was not accepted. Please contact your election administrator.
Ballot was not included in the final count.
This ballot was recorded as spoiled and was not included in the final count.
Ballot has been received by the election office.
This election uses ElectionGuard for end-to-end verifiability.
This election is not over yet. Please check back after the election has closed.
Download the full electronic election record.
Enter your confirmation code to verify the status of your ballot in the results of the election. If you have a code and do not find it, please contact your local election officials.
Click here for information about this claim and how you can verify the tally yourself.
Please try scanning your QR code again, or
click here to manually enter your code.
The tally of the ballots in this election has been independently verified to be correctly counted.
No matching items for your current Filter(s) and Search
Detailed results for one or more voting method may not be published at this time. These results are represented by a dash (-) instead of a number.
View status for each polling place

Some results have been hidden in cases where not enough ballots were cast to ensure voter privacy or if the results have not been published for a voting method. These results are represented by a dash (-) instead of a number.
Some results have been hidden in cases where not enough ballots were cast to ensure voter privacy. These results are represented by a dash (-) instead of a number.

Below results display the first choice votes for the ranked choice contest. Final tabulation rounds and winner(s) will be displayed once all ballots have been received and counted,  and may take up to 7 days.
Learn more about ranked choice voting

Search for the contest or candidate name you are interested in
This page auto-refreshes and is updated in real-time.
